name: he-starts-to-defend
prompt: Medium shot. Dark-haired man opening his mouth to speak, hand raised slightly. Defensive posture beginning. Warm amber room behind. | anime manga, cel shading, clean linework, dramatic lighting

name: dont
prompt: Close-up, tight framing. Brunette woman cutting him off mid-word. Eyes sharp, jaw set. Dark radiating lines behind her. | anime manga, cel shading, dramatic lighting

name: she-dismantles
prompt: Medium shot. Brunette woman at table, light catching her dark eyes. Eyes hard, jaw set. Warm amber from room, cool hint from window. | anime manga, cel shading, clean linework, dramatic lighting

dialogue.speaker: Sera
dialogue.text: Do you actually believe a line on a treaty will protect you when both sides decide it won't?

name: two-shot-distance
prompt: Two-shot from side angle. Dark-haired man LEFT of frame, brunette woman RIGHT. Table between them, visible space. Warm amber room. Neither moving closer. | anime manga, cel shading, clean linework, dramatic lighting

dialogue.speaker: Idris
dialogue.text: It's not about protection. It's about choosing where to stand.
